name: paper-reading-toolkit
description: Codex toolkit for one-click AGENTS.md-aware academic paper reading setup, Markdown formatting, and Obsidian Academic Research archiving.

interface.shortDescription: Set up and run paper reading with Obsidian.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that bundles a one-click AGENTS.md-aware paper-reading workflow: setup, deep paper analysis, clearer Markdown output, and Obsidian Academic Research note routing.
defaultPrompt: Use paper-reading-workflow to set up my paper reading toolkit.
Use paper-reading-workflow to read this paper and connect it to my notes.
Archive this paper discussion to Obsidian Academic Research.
